features.name: clog2 in typedef array dimension
features.description: Code should include a typedef with $clog2() used to compute the array dimension width

features.name: parameterized clog2 expression in dimension
features.description: Code should include a parameterized $clog2 expression subtracted by a constant inside an array dimension
features.snippet:
parameter int NoSlvPorts = 8;
typedef logic [$clog2(NoSlvPorts)-1:0] select_t;
